highest_mean_label: Which density curve has the rightmost mean marker?
Find the curve label whose mean marker is furthest to the right.
Which labeled curve has the highest mean x-value?
Identify the density curve with the rightmost center-of-mass marker.
Which label corresponds to the density curve whose mean lies farthest right?
lowest_mean_label: Which density curve has the leftmost mean marker?
Find the curve label whose mean marker is furthest to the left.
Which labeled curve has the lowest mean x-value?
Identify the density curve with the leftmost center-of-mass marker.
Which label corresponds to the density curve whose mean lies farthest left?
leftmost_mode_label: Which density curve has the leftmost visible peak marker?
Find the curve label whose dominant peak is furthest to the left.
Which labeled curve has the lowest x-location for its main mode?
Identify the density curve with the leftmost peak marker.
Which label corresponds to the curve whose main peak lies farthest left?
rightmost_mode_label: Which density curve has the rightmost visible peak marker?
Find the curve label whose dominant peak is furthest to the right.
Which labeled curve has the highest x-location for its main mode?
Identify the density curve with the rightmost peak marker.
Which label corresponds to the curve whose main peak lies farthest right?
greatest_interval_mass_label: Inside the marked x-interval "{interval_label}", which density curve has the greatest shaded mass?
Using only the marked interval "{interval_label}", find the curve label with the largest area under the curve.
Which labeled density curve contributes the most mass inside "{interval_label}"?
Within the shaded interval "{interval_label}", which curve has the greatest density mass?
Find the label of the curve with the largest shaded area inside "{interval_label}".
least_interval_mass_label: Inside the marked x-interval "{interval_label}", which density curve has the least shaded mass?
Using only the marked interval "{interval_label}", find the curve label with the smallest area under the curve.
Which labeled density curve contributes the least mass inside "{interval_label}"?
Within the shaded interval "{interval_label}", which curve has the smallest density mass?
Find the label of the curve with the smallest shaded area inside "{interval_label}".
highest_density_at_x_label: At the marked x-value "{reference_x_label}", which density curve is highest?
Using the vertical reference line at x = {reference_x_label}, find the curve label with the greatest density.
Which labeled density curve has the highest y-value at x = {reference_x_label}?
At x = {reference_x_label}, which curve reaches the greatest density?
Look where the curves meet the marked x-position "{reference_x_label}". Which label is highest there?
lowest_density_at_x_label: At the marked x-value "{reference_x_label}", which density curve is lowest?
Using the vertical reference line at x = {reference_x_label}, find the curve label with the smallest density.
Which labeled density curve has the lowest y-value at x = {reference_x_label}?
At x = {reference_x_label}, which curve has the smallest density?
Look where the curves meet the marked x-position "{reference_x_label}". Which label is lowest there?

query:highest_mean_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible density-curve label as a string
query:highest_mean_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the [x,y] pixel point at the center of the answer curve mean marker

query:lowest_mean_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible density-curve label as a string
query:lowest_mean_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the [x,y] pixel point at the center of the answer curve mean marker

query:leftmost_mode_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible density-curve label as a string
query:leftmost_mode_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the [x,y] pixel point at the center of the answer curve peak marker

query:rightmost_mode_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible density-curve label as a string
query:rightmost_mode_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the [x,y] pixel point at the center of the answer curve peak marker

query:greatest_interval_mass_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible density-curve label as a string
query:greatest_interval_mass_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an [x,y] pixel point on the answer curve inside the marked interval

query:least_interval_mass_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible density-curve label as a string
query:least_interval_mass_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an [x,y] pixel point on the answer curve inside the marked interval

query:highest_density_at_x_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible density-curve label as a string
query:highest_density_at_x_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the [x,y] pixel point on the answer curve at the marked x-position

query:lowest_density_at_x_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible density-curve label as a string
query:lowest_density_at_x_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the [x,y] pixel point on the answer curve at the marked x-position
